input.background:
The completion time $X$ for a project has a cumulative distribution function defined piecewise as follows:

$$
F(x)= \begin{cases}0 & \text { for } x<0 \\
\frac{x^3}{3} & \text { for } 0 \leq x<1 \\
1-\frac{1}{2}\left(\frac{7}{3}-x\right)\left(\frac{7}{4}-\frac{3}{4} x\right) & \text { for } 1 \leq x<\frac{7}{3} \\
1 & \text { for } x \geq \frac{7}{3}\end{cases}
$$
input.question: Calculate the expected completion time.

meta_info.chapter: Chapter 1: Basic Probability, Statistics, and Reliability
